seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Belli Park and Bells Bridge. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Belli Park vs Bells Bridge: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Belli Park and Bells Bridge.
heading: Belli Park vs Bells Bridge — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Belli Park, Queensland and Bells Bridge, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bells Bridge has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Belli Park (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Belli Park or Bells Bridge safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Belli Park has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Bells Bridge scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Belli Park scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Bells Bridge scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Belli Park or Bells Bridge?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bells Bridge has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
